x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert volume and noise ratio affect Now Assist TSOM AI correlation quality. High noise degrades AI grouping accuracy.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var d=new GlideDateTime();d.addDaysUTC(-30);var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr.addQuery("sys_created_on",">=",d.getValue());gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr2.addQuery("state","Closed");gr2.query();var closed=gr2.getRowCount();var tot=new GlideRecord("em_alert");tot.query();var total=tot.getRowCount();var pct=total>0?Math.round((closed/total)*100):0;return{status:(n<10000&&pct>=50)?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" alerts last 30 days | "+pct+"% closed",finding:"Alert volume: "+n+" in 30 days with "+pct+"% closure rate. "+(n>=10000||pct<50?"High noise environment degrades Now Assist TSOM event correlation accuracy.":"Alert noise ratio acceptable for Now Assist TSOM AI correlation.")};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Tune alert thresholds to reduce false positives. Enable auto-close for self-resolving alerts. Review em_alert_rule_list.do.
